world_physics.note: Approximately 2x Earth gravity — this world is heavier, making movement a skill that must be mastered

movement_rules.walking: Default movement. No stamina cost. Speed determined by entity's move_speed attribute.
movement_rules.running: Sprint modifier. Stamina drain per second. Speed = base × (1 + sprint_bonus).
movement_rules.jumping: Vertical launch. Requires being on solid ground. Stamina cost. Height = jump_velocity attribute.
movement_rules.dashing: Rapid lateral movement with invincibility frames. High stamina cost. Skill-gated.
movement_rules.falling: Passive. Applies gravity. No skill required. Damage on hard landing based on fall distance.

combat_rules.damage_formula: bilateral: reads attributes from BOTH caster and target. Final = base × attack_power × crit × elemental_mult × resistance.
combat_rules.hit_detection: Skill-defined hitboxes. Shape, size, and lifetime per skill atom.
combat_rules.invincibility_frames: Granted by dodge skills. Duration per skill. During i-frames, all collision is ignored.
combat_rules.parry_window: Time window during which a defensive skill can counter an incoming attack. Duration per skill.
combat_rules.death: HP reaches 0. Entity enters dying state. Death animation. Removal from combat.

time_scale.real_time: All actions happen in real-time. No turn-based mechanics in the computer implementation.
time_scale.tabletop_adaptation: When played as tabletop RPG, time scales to rounds (6 seconds each). Skills with cooldowns map to round counts.
